name: Savory Scallops on Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Parboil scallops in water that does not quite cover them. Add vinegar. Keep the water just below boiling.
2. Cook scallops until they turn white and cook quickly. Do not overcook as it will toughen them.
3. Drain the scallops and reserve the cooking liquid.
4. Quarter the scallops if they are large.
5. To the reserved cooking liquid, add enough water to make a total of 1-1/3 cups.
6. Melt butter in a double boiler. Add flour and stir until blended.
7. Gradually add the scallop liquid while continuing to stir and cook over low heat.
8. Slowly add mayonnaise once the sauce thickens.
9. Add the scallops, thyme, and salt. Heat through but do not allow the water-underside to boil.
10. Serve on toast or in toast cups.
